_status: REFRAMING CANDIDATE. EcosystemAgent is NOT part of the WMS layer pipeline. Its current shape (aggregate per-biome counts with fake regeneration) duplicates state that already exists in NaturalResource and the raw event pipeline. The likely future is to delete the state-tracking code and replace it with a thin query API over the actual World System (scanning loaded chunks / NaturalResource instances). See world_system/docs/ARCHITECTURAL_DECISIONS.md §3. Do NOT build new features against this schema. For now, the config stays as-is so the existing agent keeps compiling.
description: Ecosystem configuration for resource tracking, scarcity thresholds, and regeneration rates.

scarcity_thresholds.description: Depletion ratios that trigger scarcity flags (0.7 = 70% depleted)

regeneration_rates.description: Resource respawn timers in game-seconds. 'null' means no regeneration.

event_publishing.description: Events published when resources cross scarcity thresholds
